# STRAT.015 ? Jobs to be Done (JTBD)

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** strategic_frameworks
**Subcategory:** business_strategy
**Domain:** BUSINESS_STRATEGY
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Customers hire products for jobs; functional/emotional/social jobs; progress not features; circumstances matter; competition is anything hired

## Application
Identify job to be done; understand full context; focus on progress made; consider all alternatives customer might hire; design for job

## Key Values
- Job focus
- Progress
- Context
- Hiring decision
- Outcome orientation

## Tags
philosophy, strategic-framework, business_strategy

## Notes
Strategic framework ingested into philosophy library per operator mapping rule.
